title: Create: Full Steam Ahead
description: The Official Public Server Modpack for Vita MC. Experience immersive engineering gameplay, explore vast mechanical landscapes, and conquer complex challenges.
body:
# Set Sail on a Mechanical Marvel with Create: Full Steam Ahead
## Summary
Welcome to a world where every corner is teeming with mystery, every encounter brimming with excitement, and every adventure waiting to be uncovered. Ultimate RPG Adventure is not just another modpack – it's an immersive experience crafted for those who seek the thrill of exploration, the challenge of survival, and the magic of discovery.

## Ingenious Engineering Elements
Dive into a rich world filled with engineering-inspired gameplay elements. Design complex machines, build elaborate factories, and master the art of automation to bring your mechanical dreams to life.

## Expansive Exploration
Traverse a meticulously crafted world ripe for exploration. From lush valleys to rugged mountains, every biome is a playground for your engineering prowess. Discover hidden resources, ancient technologies, and untapped potential as you expand your mechanical empire.

## Challenging Innovations
Prepare to tackle formidable engineering challenges and overcome intricate puzzles. Whether you're constructing colossal contraptions or refining delicate mechanisms, every project tests your creativity and problem-solving skills.

## Community-driven Experience
Join a vibrant community of innovators on the Vita SMP server. Collaborate with fellow players, share your ingenious creations, and embark on group projects to push the boundaries of what's possible together.
[Join our community](https://discord.gg/brogan)
